div.h1: One-Shot vs Repeating Timer: Heap State Before and After Expiry

div.p: One-Shot (interval_ms = 0) • heap_cancel_at_slot BEFORE cb • slot memset'd to zero • heap_size decremented • cb sees timer already gone • cancel(tid) in cb → -1 (safe) • No re-fire after cb

Repeating (interval_ms > 0) • expiry_ms += interval BEFORE cb • sift_down repositions in heap • heap_size unchanged • slot remains active during cb • cancel(tid) in cb → 0 (found and removed) • Re-fires at new expiry if not cancelled
